comments.author: @Crimsonking914
comments.text:
If you're going to  make videos promoting great areas of our country, at least learn how to pronounce the names of the places you are promoting before making your video!
Thanks!
Oh! and you left out the whitewater and mountain areas in the upstate and all of the recreational possibilities it provides.
Greenville notwithstanding.
